title: Compliance Certified
desc: ISO 27001 and GDPR certified. Pursuing PDPA Singapore and MAS TRM alignment for ASEAN financial services, third-party audited annually.

title: Data Sovereignty
desc: Sovereign-grade infrastructure rooted in Singapore, with regional data residency spanning ASEAN, EMEA, and the Americas. Every customer record stays in the precise jurisdiction your regulator demands. Audited quarterly with full chain-of-custody attestation.

title: Verified Reliability
desc: 99.999% verified uptime across geo-redundant points of presence. TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, with quarterly third-party penetration testing.

title: Access Governance
desc: Role-based access control (RBAC) across the entire platform. Fine-grained permissions for every team, tenant, and workflow, with detailed activity logs and SSO integration built in.
